observed_strengths: PromptVault reports quality deltas for both GLM and local recommendations.
The weak-first CLI repair queue can now expose bounded prompt bodies through an explicit opt-in.
The local fallback is deterministic and testable.
observed_weaknesses: CLI improve still preferred GLM whenever keys were present, so smoke tests could depend on network availability or rate limits.
Previous live GLM smoke observed a 429 and then fallback, which made deterministic evaluation indirect.
Batch repair queue automation needs an explicit local provider path rather than relying on accidental GLM failure.

selected_candidate.name: deterministic local improve flag
selected_candidate.reason: Allow agents to force local-rules recommendations for reproducible offline repair queue evaluation.
selected_candidate.success_metric: improve --local --json --prompt "make better" returns provider=local-rules, used_ai=false, warnings=[], and a positive quality_delta.
